message:
chore(beads): sync issue store state (last-touched bump, 7 issue updates)

Routine `br sync --flush-only` output capturing coordination / status
updates made by concurrent agents while the frankensearch bump and
hex::encode migration work was underway. No source changes here — just
exporting the sqlite store to JSONL so later `br ready` / `bv triage`
calls see the same state as the DB.

.beads/last-touched: bumped pointer to coding_agent_session_search-ibuuh.21.
.beads/issues.jsonl: 7 issues with minor field changes (updated_at,
  assignee, status, short comment threads) — all on in-flight
  frankensqlite-integration and cross-library-validation epics.
